parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ghl_sync_state (entity, location_id, last_synced_at, records_synced, updated_at)
VALUES ('pipelines', $1, NOW(), $2, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (entity, location_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_synced_at = NOW(),
  records_synced = ghl_sync_state.records_synced + EXCLUDED.records_synced,
  last_error     = NULL,
  updated_at     = NOW()
